'''Chimbak wine''' was a thick [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Wine/Legends|wine]] from<ref name="Rogue Planet" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. [[Foodstuff/Legends|Potable]] by [[Human/Legends|Humans]], the wine had a mellow and delicious flavor.<ref name="Rogue Planet" />

In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]],<ref name="The Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Rogue Planet]]'', which includes the meeting in [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin's apartment|apartment]], to [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].</ref> [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Republic Outland Regions Security Force]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] and<ref name="Rogue Planet" /> [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|Chief Executive Officer]]<ref name="New Essential">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]] drank glasses of chimbak wine in the former's [[Wilhuff Tarkin's apartment|private apartment]] on<ref name="Rogue Planet" /> the planet<ref name="TEA" /> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during a meeting with the [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Ke Daiv]]. Although Sienar did not normally drink [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]], he sampled the wine to be polite during the meeting. Sienar found himself enjoying the wine, finished his entire glass, and complimented Tarkin on his good taste.<ref name="Rogue Planet" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chimbak wine appeared in ''[[Rogue Planet]]'', a [[2005]] novel by [[Greg Bear]].<ref name="Rogue Planet" />
